Enable for Argus 3 Pro, B400, D400, E1,: Enable for Argus 3 Pro, B400, D400, E1, and similar battery cameras
How long to wait before pausing stream w: How long to wait before pausing stream when no RTSP client connected (default: 2.1s, neolink setting)
Required for battery cameras (find in Re: Required for battery cameras (find in Reolink app or camera settings)
Stream will automatically disable after: Stream will automatically disable after this timeout to save battery (default: 30s)
